messages.content: Additionally, by the end of this week can you provide a clear explanation of what happened to his tax return, why it was not filed on time.  My team received prior confirmation that the return had been filed and we had communicated this to the client (Janice - I understand that you and Tino shared message on this?)  If you can share this internally to our team we can review and agree how we can best explain this to the client and also ensure this does not happen again.

As an AI language model, I do not have access to any personal or confidential information. However, I suggest talking to the relevant parties involved in the tax return filing and clarifying the situation. Based on the information you have provided, it seems like there may have been a miscommunication or error in the processing of the return. It is important to identify the root cause and put measures in place to prevent similar issues from arising in the future. Transparency and clear communication with the client are crucial in maintaining trust and resolving any concerns they may have.
How can i explain why my client's tax return was not filed on time

If your client's tax return was not filed on time, it is important to provide a clear and honest explanation to them. Here is a suggested explanation:

"Hello [Client Name], I wanted to touch base with you regarding your tax return. Unfortunately, it wasn't filed on time, and I wanted to provide an explanation as to why. According to our records, we had previously thought that the return had been filed, and we apologize for any confusion this may have caused. However, we have since found out that there was an issue with the processing of the return, which caused the delay. We recognize that this is not acceptable, and we have taken steps to ensure that this issue does not happen again in the future. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused, and we are committed to resolving this matter as quickly and efficiently as possible. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to me."
please rephrase  "the IRD has also explained to us that the miscommunication would probably caused by we submit the tax representative letter before their creation of Jake’ tax file record. "
The IRD has clarified that the miscommunication may have occurred because our tax representative letter was submitted prior to the creation of Jake's tax file record.

please rephrase "Since Jake arrived in HK and started his assignment HK during the year 2021/22, it would take a lot of time for the HK Inland Revenue Department (" IRD ") to open his tax file records and to assign a tax file number to Jake as Jake is a new HK tax filer. Without the tax file number, the IRD would not be able to update any record including the taxpayer’s tax representative. Moreover, there is no timeframe when will the new tax file record / number be created by the IRD."

As Jake arrived in Hong Kong and began his assignment in the 2021/22 fiscal year, the process of opening his tax file records and assigning him a tax file number is taking considerable time due to him being a new tax filer in Hong Kong. Without a tax file number, the IRD is unable to update any records, including those of the taxpayer's tax representative. Unfortunately, there is no specific timeframe for when the IRD will create a new tax file record and issue a tax file number to Jake.

please rephrase "Based on our records, we have submitted the Jake’s signed tax appointment letter to the IRD, and in general practice, when the IRD sends any correspondence to the taxpayer, a tax representative’s copy will also been sent. However, we did not receive any correspondence in respect of Jake from the IRD. Until we have been notified that a penalty notice is issued to Jake, the IRD informed us that they have not updated us as Jake’s tax representation and no correspondence for tax representative has been sent. The IRD has explained that the miscommunication may have occurred because our tax representative letter was submitted prior to the creation of Jake’s tax file record."

According to our records, we submitted Jake's signed tax appointment letter to the IRD, and as is the normal practice, any correspondence sent by the IRD to the taxpayer is also sent to their appointed tax representative. However, we did not receive any correspondence from the IRD regarding Jake. We were informed by the IRD that, until a penalty notice is issued to Jake, they have not recognized us as his tax representative and thus, no correspondence has been sent to us. The IRD clarified that this miscommunication may have resulted from us submitting the tax representative letter before the creation of Jake's tax file record.

please rephrase"As mentioned previously, the IRD may occasionally miss to inform the tax representative and cause the delay of the tax filings. We have then immediately requested the IRD to issue a duplicate copy of Jake's 2021/22 tax return for our handling."

As previously mentioned, there may be instances where the IRD fails to inform the tax representative, which can result in delays in tax filings. Upon discovering this issue, we promptly requested that the IRD issue us a duplicate copy of Jake's 2021/22 tax return for our handling.
rephrase "Without a tax file number, the IRD is unable to update any records, including the record of taxpayer’s tax representative, or issue any HK individual tax return to the taxpayer"

The absence of a tax file number means that the IRD cannot update any records such as the taxpayer's record or the record of their tax representative, nor can they issue any Hong Kong individual tax return to the taxpayer.

rephrase “As Jake arrived in Hong Kong and began his assignment in the year 2021/22, the process of opening his tax file records and assigning him a tax file number by the HK Inland Revenue Department (" IRD ") is taking considerable time due to him being a new tax filer in Hong Kong. Without a tax file number, the IRD is unable to update any records, including the record of taxpayer’s tax representative, or issue any HK individual tax return to the taxpayer. Unfortunately, there were no specific timeframe for when the IRD will create a new tax file record and issue a tax file number to Jake. "

Due to Jake being a new tax filer in Hong Kong who arrived during the 2021/22 fiscal year, the HK Inland Revenue Department (IRD) is taking considerable time to open his tax file records and assign him a tax file number. As a result of not having a tax file number, the IRD cannot update any records, including those of the taxpayer's tax representative, or issue any Hong Kong individual tax return to the taxpayer. Unfortunately, the IRD has not provided a specific timeframe for when they will create a new tax file record and issue a tax file number to Jake.
rephrase "Thanks for your request to the IRD"
Thank you for your request to the IRD.
rephrase "Thank you for requesting the IRD to issue your tax return to us"
We appreciate you contacting the IRD and requesting that your tax return be issued to us. Thank you.
rephrase again
Thank you for submitting a request to the IRD to have your tax return issued to our office. We appreciate your assistance in facilitating this process.
rephrase we will confirm receipt of the paper tax return once we receive it
Once we receive the paper tax return, we will acknowledge receipt through a confirmation message.
rephrase Thank you for submitting a request to the IRD to have your tax return issued to us, we will confirm receipt of the paper tax return once we receive it.
We would like to thank you for requesting the IRD to issue your tax return to our office. Upon receiving the paper tax return, we will acknowledge receipt through a confirmation message.
